figures.caption: Fig. 2: Sampled agents’ densities and aggregates on the power-law graph. The color of the lines get darker with higher agent index.
Fig. 3: Socially (most) active/inactive agent under policy/no policy.
Fig. 4: Stackelberg Equilibrium Policy (0, solid lines) vs NoRegulation (1, dashed lines) on age-groups.
Fig. 5: Duo-Principal Stackelberg Equilibrium (0, solid lines) vs No-Regulation (1, dashed lines) on age-groups.
